title: biscutella varia subsp. kerneri
intro: Biscutella varia subsp. kerneri, also known as Kern's rockcress, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and grayish-green leaves. Traditionally, Kern's rockcress has been used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's medicinal properties are said to contribute to various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Kern's rockcress is often used as a tea or tincture, and its flowers and leaves are also used in infusions to promote overall well-being.
